title: Looking for Category Manager at Cleartrip

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Cleartrip
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cleartrip family as a Category Manager in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cleartrip:
Cleartrip is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
